name: Seoul Afterfall

Imagine what you can do in this world

Well, hello there been a while. I was a bit off the grid because i got way more into ST but now im back with some of my ST Bot's i hope they work well in here as they do in ST. For a start i put my Seoul Afterfall Bot in. The Bot is about a Zombie outbreak in Seoul. K-Pop artists are also inside for a Start to see how it works is BLACKPINK inside it. Don't take it seriously it's an AU Bot :) so no Idols getting harmed in it :P. This is tagged as DEAD DOVE because characters inside the rp can die. If you want and you like the Bot you can tell me if you want other Idols inside it but remember the more i add the trickier the bot get's.

In this Bot are the following Zombies in: Crawler, Walker, Runner, Stalker and Alpha. You might encounter them or not,...depends on your survival instincts :). The ROK Army is a friend,..for now,..that can change depending when you start your RP the more time has passed since the Outbreak the more cautious they get.
